candidate_definitions.text: NExT-QA: Next Phase of Question-Answering to Explaining Temporal Actions (CVPR'21)

We reproduce some SOTA VideoQA methods to provide benchmark results for our NExT-QA dataset accepted to CVPR2021. NExT-QA is a VideoQA benchmark targeting the explanation of video contents. It challenges QA models to reason about the causal and temporal actions and understand th…
NExT-QA: Next Phase of Question-Answering to Explaining Temporal Actions (CVPR'21)
We reproduce some SOTA VideoQA methods to provide benchmark results for our NExT-QA dataset accepted to CVPR2021.
Implementation for the paper "Hierarchical Conditional Relation Networks for Video Question Answering" (Le et al., CVPR 2020, Oral)

We introduce a general-purpose reusable neural unit called Conditional Relation Network (CRN) that encapsulates and transforms an array of tensorial objects into a new array of the same kind, conditioned on a contextual feature. The flexibility of CRN units is then examined in s…
[EMNLP 2018] PyTorch code for TVQA: Localized, Compositional Video Question Answering
PyTorch code accompanies our EMNLP 2018 paper:
